description: Enterprise Grafana alerting engine deep-dive. Alert rule evaluation performance, notification pipeline health, alertmanager operations, silences, and alert state transitions. Built for platform admins managing alerting at scale.

panels.description: Total configured alert rules across all instances.
panels.title: Alert Rules Total

panels.description: Currently active (firing) alerts across all alertmanager instances.
panels.title: Active Alerts

panels.description: Alerts currently suppressed by silences or inhibition rules.
panels.title: Suppressed Alerts

panels.description: Active silence rules. High numbers may indicate alert fatigue — review whether silences are masking real issues.
panels.title: Active Silences

panels.description: Percentage of alert rule evaluations completing without error. Below 99% indicates rules failing to evaluate — check datasource connectivity and query validity.
panels.title: Rule Evaluation Success Rate

panels.description: Percentage of alert notifications delivered successfully. Failures indicate contact point misconfigurations or downstream delivery issues.
panels.title: Notification Success Rate

panels.description: Rate of alert rule evaluations and failures. Spikes in failures indicate datasource timeouts or malformed queries.
panels.title: Rule Evaluation Rate

panels.description: Alert rule evaluation latency. P99 above 10s indicates rules taking too long — consider optimizing queries or splitting rule groups.
panels.title: Rule Evaluation Duration

panels.description: Notification delivery rate by contact point type (email, slack, pagerduty, webhook, etc.).
panels.title: Notifications Sent/s

panels.description: Notification delivery failures by type. Persistent failures require checking contact point credentials and endpoint availability.
panels.title: Notification Failures/s

panels.description: Time taken to deliver notifications. High latency indicates slow downstream receivers (SMTP server, webhook endpoint, etc.).
panels.title: Notification Latency

panels.description: Alert state over time. Rising active alerts without corresponding silences indicate a growing incident or noisy alerting rules.
panels.title: Alert State Transitions

panels.description: Silence lifecycle tracking. Many expired silences suggest temporary workarounds becoming permanent — review and clean up.
panels.title: Silences Over Time

panels.description: Slowest alert rule groups by average evaluation time. Candidates for query optimization or group splitting.
panels.title: Top 10 Slowest Rule Groups

panels.description: Rule groups with the highest failure rates. Check datasource availability and query correctness for these groups.
panels.title: Top 10 Most Failing Rule Groups

panels.description: Number of alertmanager instances in the cluster. Should match expected replica count.
panels.title: Alertmanager Cluster Members

panels.description: Cluster health score. 0 = fully healthy. Values above 0 indicate cluster communication issues between alertmanager peers.
panels.title: Cluster Peer Health

panels.description: Notification log garbage collection duration. Increasing values indicate growing notification state.
panels.title: Alertmanager Notification Log Entries

panels.description: Alert rules broken down by current state. Normal rules are evaluating without triggering. Pending = for duration condition not yet met. Firing = actively alerting.
panels.title: Rules by State

panels.description: Rate of alert groups received by alertmanager for processing.
panels.title: Alert Groups Processed/s

title: Grafana Alerting — Advanced Operations
